name: Hanzo
description: A ranged Assassin who specializes in scouting and taking out enemies from a distance.
title: Master Assassin
info: Once heir to the Shimada clan's criminal empire, Hanzo abandoned his birthright after he almost killed his younger brother. He now strives to perfect his skills as a warrior, and sees the Nexus and its endless conflict as the ideal training ground.

Hanzo.name: Storm Bow
Hanzo.description: Activate to charge an arrow that deals 291 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit. Storm Bow's range increases the longer it is Channeled.

Hanzo.name: Scatter Arrow
Hanzo.description: Fire an arrow that deals 88 (+4% per level) to the first enemy Hero hit. Scatter Arrow can collide with terrain and Structures, splitting into 5 arrows that travel extra distance, ricochet up to 4 additional times, and deal 88 (+4% per level) damage each to the first enemy hit.

Hanzo.name: Sonic Arrow
Hanzo.description: Fire an arrow that grants vision in a large area for 5 seconds. Enemies inside are revealed for 1 second. If Sonic Arrow lands directly on an enemy, it deals 165 (+4% per level) damage to them and follows them as they move.

Hanzo.name: Dragonstrike
Hanzo.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.

Hanzo.name: Dragon's Arrow
Hanzo.description: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.

Hanzo.name: Natural Agility
Hanzo.description: Jump over unpathable terrain or Structures, up to a maximum range.

1.name: Target Practice
1.description: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.

1.name: Simple Geometry
1.description: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.  Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.

1.name: Redemption
1.description: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.  Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.

4.name: Explosive Arrows
4.description: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.

4.name: Serrated Arrows
4.description: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

4.name: Ignore All Distractions
4.description: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.

7.name: The Dragon Hungers
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.

7.name: Never Outmatched
7.description: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.

7.name: Sharpened Arrowheads
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.

10.name: Dragonstrike
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.

10.name: Dragon's Arrow
10.description: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.

13.name: Fleet of Foot
13.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.

13.name: Ninja Assassin
13.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.

13.name: Mounted Archery
13.description: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds. Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.

16.name: Flawless Technique
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.

16.name: Piercing Arrows
16.description: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.

16.name: Giant Slayer
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 1.6% of their maximum Health as damage.

20.name: The Dragon Awakens
20.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.

20.name: Play of the Game
20.description: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 (+4% per level) damage to each target hit by the impact.  Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.

20.name: Bullseye
20.description: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.

20.name: Perfect Agility
20.description: Natural Agility gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.HanzoBullseye: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoBullseyeStun,Duration"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoDragonsArrow: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel1Damage,Amount"/></c> damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel1Stun,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel2Damage,Amount"/></c> and the Stun duration to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel2Stun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel3Damage,Amount"/></c> and the Stun duration to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoDragonsArrowLevel3Stun,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoDragonstrike: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HanzoDragonstrike,CastIntroTime" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoDragonstrikeDragonOuterDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoDragonstrikeDragonInnerDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[InnerDamage].Modifier*100"/>%</c> increased damage.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoExplosiveArrows: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(1+Effect,HanzoExplosiveArrowsDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ExplosiveArrowsDamageModifier].Modifier)"/>%</c> of its damage to enemies around its target.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoFlawlessTechnique: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoFlawlessTechniqueEmpowerBasicAttack,Duration"/></c> seconds by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FlawlessTechniqueTalentDamageBuff].Modifier * 100"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoFlawlessTechniqueEmpowerStormBow,Duration"/></c> seconds by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoStormBowDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FlawlessTechniqueTalentDamageBonus].Modifier * 100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoFleetofFoot: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoFleetofFootMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoFleetofFootMovementSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoFleetofFootMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * Behavior,HanzoFleetofFootMovementSpeed,MaxStackCount * 100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoGiantSlayer: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoGiantSlayerBonusDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life] * 100" precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoIgnoreAllDistractions: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoIgnoreAllDistractionsIncreaseBasicAttackRange,Modification.WeaponRange"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoIgnoreAllDistractionsIncreaseBasicAttackRange,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoMountedArchery: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,HanzoMountedArcheryApplyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds. Upon mounting, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,HanzoMountedArcheryMoveSpeedBonus,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor - Behavior,Mounted,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)* 100"/>%</c> additional Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoNaturalAgility: Jump over unpathable terrain or Structures, up to a maximum range.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoNeverOutmatched: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HanzoScatterArrow,Cost[0].Vital[Energy]" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HanzoScatterArrow,Cost[0].Vital[Energy] + Talent,HanzoNeverOutmatched,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,HanzoNeverOutmatchedReduceScatterArrowCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoNinjaAssassin: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,HanzoNinjaAssassinReduceNaturalAgilityCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"/></c> seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoPOTG: While in flight or for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoPOTGCanReactivateTimer,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoPOTGDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to each target hit by the impact.<n/><n/>Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoPerfectAgility: Natural Agility gains a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,HanzoPerfectAgility,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoPiercingArrows: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> enemy each time it ricochets.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoRedemption: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within seconds grants Redemption, stacking up to . Dying decreases Redemption by , and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.Reward: At Redemption, gain % Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoScatterArrow: Fire an arrow that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoScatterArrowRicochetDamage,Amount"/></c> to the first enemy Hero hit. Scatter Arrow can collide with terrain and Structures, splitting into <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> arrows that travel extra distance, ricochet up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> additional times, and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoScatterArrowRicochetDamage,Amount"/></c> damage each to the first enemy hit.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoSerratedArrows: Scatter Arrow deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoScatterArrowRicochetDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[TalentSerratedArrowsDamageModifier].Modifier * 100"/>%</c> more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoSharpenedArrowheads: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,HanzoSharpenedArrowheadsArmorReduction,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus * Effect,HanzoSharpenedArrowheadsApplyArmorReduction,Count"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoSharpenedArrowheadsArmorReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to a maximum reduction of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,HanzoSharpenedArrowheadsArmorReduction,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus * Behavior,HanzoSharpenedArrowheadsArmorReduction,ArmorModification.StackCount"/></c> Armor.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoSimpleGeometry: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoSonicArrow: Fire an arrow that grants vision in a large area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoSonicArrowTrackerTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Enemies inside are revealed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoSonicArrowRevealer,Duration"/></c> second. If Sonic Arrow lands directly on an enemy, it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoSonicArrowDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to them and follows them as they move.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoStormBow: Activate to charge an arrow that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HanzoStormBowDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit. Storm Bow's range increases the longer it is Channeled.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoTargetPractice: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by .
tooltipMarkup.HanzoTheDragonAwakens: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,HanzoTheDragonAwakensReduceDragonstrikeCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HanzoTheDragonHungers: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoTheDragonHungers,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability] * 100"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoTheDragonHungers,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HanzoTheDragonHungers,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability] * Behavior,HanzoTheDragonHungers,MaxStackCount * 100"/>%</c>.
